questions.question_text: Answer the following questions. Write short note on: a Industrial Buying 2.5 b Market Segmentation 2.5 c Self- consciousness 2.5 d Murray’s list of psychogenic needs 2.5 e Consumer Behaviour 2.5 f Customer Perception 2.5 g Role of Children in Buying Behaviour 2.5 h Innovation 2.5
Explaining the terms Targeting and Positioning, give a strategy which you would advise a real estate developer for coming out with a fully serviced apartment building in the luxury segment. 10
Home buying may be a lifelong exercise for a middle class family. Commenting on this statement, kindly explain the importance of studying the consumer behavior in real estate market 10
With a neat diagram, explain the Maslow’s hierarchy of needs 10
List key features of Freudian and Neo-Freudian Theory. Explain w.r.t the real estate markets. 10
Informed decision making must be promoted within all stakeholders to minimize the wastage. Explain this statement w.r.t the consumer involvement in the pre-design phase 10
Explain various learning theory w.r.t the typical site operations at a construction site 10
Discuss models of consumer decision making 10
Explain the terms Group Dynamics and consumer reference groups with suitable examples 10
